creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 176950
patch to remove optional dependency on net/vnc

net/xrdp (and net/xrdp-devel) have an optional dependency on net/vnc (off by default) but that port expired on 2016-09-01, so lets remove it.

Patches for net/xrdp and net/xrdp-devel are attached.
